com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces

Interface IUHFA8

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IMultipleAntenna, IUHF, IUHFAx
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    RFIDWithUHFNetworkA8, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortA8

    public interface IUHFA8
extends IUHF, IUHFAx, IMultipleAntenna
